Partners & Accreditations

Choosing where to have your implants done is a big call. We've helped hundreds of Australians make it — and we treat it with the care it deserves.

Treatments

Implant care, matched to your case

Every patient receives a written, itemised treatment plan — reviewed by a specialist, presented in AUD, with no surprises.

Single Tooth Implant

A precision titanium implant and crown to replace one missing tooth, matched to your bite and the surrounding teeth. Treatment is typically completed across two trips.

From
$1,670 AUD all-inclusive estimate
Get a quote for this →

Multiple Tooth Implants

Two or more implants — sometimes supporting a bridge — to replace several teeth in one arch. Often the right option where individual crowns or a partial denture would compromise comfort or appearance.

From
$3,340 AUD all-inclusive estimate
Get a quote for this →

Full Arch (All-on-4 / All-on-6)

A fixed, full set of teeth supported by 4 or 6 implants per jaw. A life-changing option for patients facing extensive tooth loss, at a fraction of equivalent treatment in Australia.

From
$8,100 AUD all-inclusive estimate
All-on-6 from $9,700 AUD
Get a quote for this →
Indicative pricing

Transparent pricing. No surprises.

How it works

From first enquiry to your final crown

A seamless experience — from first call to final crown.

1

Enquire

Fill in a short form or give us a call — takes two minutes, zero commitment.

2

Free quote & plan

Receive an itemised AUD quote and written treatment plan reviewed by a specialist implantologist — within 2 business days.

3

Travel arranged

Flights, accommodation, transfers and clinic appointments coordinated around your schedule.

4

Treatment in HCMC

Collected from the airport and treated at our partner clinic. Most stays are 5–10 days.

5

Support back home

Through healing, your final crown fitting, and beyond. You call us — your Australian contact.

Why us

Why Australian patients choose us

One point of contact in Australia

You don't navigate an overseas clinic alone. From your first quote to a year after your final crown, you have an Australian contact who knows your case.

A partner clinic Australian dentists already trust

Our partner clinic is one of HCMC's most-cited implant clinics, with AACI accreditation and ITI affiliation — the same standards used by leading Australian practices.

Everything arranged, nothing missed

Flights, transfers, accommodation, language support and post-treatment follow-up. You focus on the treatment; we handle the logistics.

Patient Stories

Real people. Real smiles. Real savings.

Your Clinical Team

Meet your dentists

Implant Specialist

Dr Tran Hung Lam

15+ yrs implantology HSDI President ITI Affiliated

Dr Lam is known among colleagues for taking on the technically demanding cases — full-arch reconstructions and patients other clinics have turned away. Patients describe him as quietly methodical and unhurried, the surgeon you want when the case matters.

Implant Specialist

Dr Tran Chau Bao Phuc

Loma Linda Master Clinician Aesthetic Lead Prosthodontics

A Loma Linda Master Clinician, Dr Phuc co-founded Elite's flagship Metropole clinic and leads its aesthetic implant work. He's the dentist patients meet when finish and natural appearance are the priority.

Common questions

The questions every Australian asks first

Our partner clinic is AACI-accredited — the same body that accredits leading Australian and US hospitals — and uses the same implant systems and surgical protocols as premium Australian practices. The surgical risk profile of a dental implant is comparable to having the same procedure done in Sydney or Melbourne.
You call us — not the clinic. Your treatment is backed by a 10–20 year international warranty (dependent on treatment type), giving you genuine long-term peace of mind. We coordinate any review, adjustment or replacement with our partner clinic on your behalf. If a return trip to Vietnam is required, we cover the standard travel arrangements — just as we did the first time.
For most cases, 5–10 days for the surgical visit, then a follow-up trip 3–6 months later (1–3 days) to fit the final crown. Some All-on-4 and All-on-6 cases complete in a single longer visit. We tell you exactly what's required at the quote stage.
Your itemised quote covers the procedure, materials, anaesthesia, follow-up appointments at the clinic, and the implant warranty. Travel packages include flights, airport transfers, accommodation, and Australian-side support before, during and after. The quote shows clearly what's in and what isn't.
Yes — and the saving comes from the cost base, not corner-cutting. Australian dental costs include high overheads (rent, wages, regulatory loadings) that don't apply in Vietnam. The same implant brands and surgical protocols simply cost the clinic far less to deliver. Example: a single implant + crown costs around $5,500 AUD in Australia versus from $1,670 AUD with us, all-inclusive of travel.
Yes — many of our patients use their superannuation to fund treatment through an early release on compassionate medical grounds. We'll connect you with a specialist application provider and supply all the clinical documentation they need to support your application. It's a well-established process, and simpler than most people expect.
Your treatment plan is signed off before any work begins, so the shape, shade and finish are agreed in advance. If something isn't right after fitting, the clinic adjusts or remakes the crown under warranty — and we coordinate it.
Cost in Vietnam ranges as widely as it does in Australia. Elite Dental sits at the premium end — AACI-accredited, internationally affiliated, used to treating Australian, American and European patients — because for an implant case, the gap between a good clinic and an average one is a difference you live with for the rest of your life.
Yes. Both Dr Lam and Dr Phuc work routinely with international patients, and the Elite Dental clinical team operates in English throughout Australian patient cases.
The clinic uses digital shade-matching and trial fittings. Dr Phuc, who leads aesthetic work, is involved in any case where front-tooth appearance is the priority. You see and approve the finish before it's fixed permanently.
Yes — and it's more accessible than most people expect. We work with a panel of lenders to find you a competitive payment plan that suits your situation and budget. Many of our patients spread the cost comfortably, with repayments starting from as little as $50 per week. We'll walk you through your options as part of the quote process, with no obligation to proceed.
Your free quote

Get your complimentary assessment today

Tell us a bit about your case. Within two business days, you'll receive a written quote and treatment plan from us, reviewed by Elite Dental's implantology team.

  • No deposit, no commitment, no pressure
  • Plan reviewed by Elite Dental's senior implantology team
  • Itemised in AUD — what's included and what isn't
  • You'll hear back from a real Australian — by phone or email, whichever you prefer

2. Elite Dental's team prepares your plan — itemised in AUD.

3. We send your quote — typically within 2 business days.
